settings.title: Pro-grade car care, made simple.
settings.lead: We started Revomotive because great detailing products were locked behind wholesale accounts and industry jargon. We built a range that works straight out of the bottle — no dilution charts, no wasted product.

items.title: Real formulation
items.body: Every product we sell is lab-tested with published specs — no marketing fluff, just numbers.

items.title: Honest specs
items.body: SiO₂ %, GSM, pH — all published so you can compare and choose with confidence.

items.title: Coating-safe
items.body: Formulated to work with, not against, your existing ceramic or wax protection.

settings.title: Stay in the loop
settings.subtitle: Product launches, tutorials, and exclusive offers — once a month, no spam.
